name: luatools
description: LuaTools Ultimate 10.2.4 — resource-leak cleanup + Millennium 3.0 fallback completeness. Fixed unclosed file handles in shipped code (accela_launcher, downloads) and across the test suite; strict ResourceWarning run is now clean. The standalone Millennium fallback now exposes the full documented 3.0 API surface (cmp_version/get_install_path/is_plugin_enabled/remove_browser_module) with a regression test. 90 tests.
